name: search_naics_codes
description: Search NAICS codes using hybrid semantic/lexical search

arguments.name: query
arguments.desc: Natural language description of the business or activity

arguments.name: strategy
arguments.desc: Search strategy: hybrid, semantic, or lexical

name: search_index_terms
description: Search 20,398 official NAICS index terms

name: find_similar_industries
description: Find NAICS codes similar to a given code

arguments.name: naics_code
arguments.desc: NAICS code to find similar codes for

name: get_similar_codes
description: Get semantically similar NAICS codes

arguments.name: naics_code
arguments.desc: NAICS code to find similar codes for

name: get_cross_sector_alternatives
description: Find alternative classifications across different sectors

arguments.name: naics_code
arguments.desc: NAICS code to find alternatives for

name: get_relationship_stats
description: Get relationship statistics for a NAICS code

arguments.name: naics_code
arguments.desc: NAICS code to get stats for

name: classify_batch
description: Classify multiple business descriptions in batch

arguments.name: descriptions
arguments.desc: List of business descriptions to classify

name: get_code_hierarchy
description: Get the full ancestor chain for a NAICS code

arguments.name: naics_code
arguments.desc: NAICS code to get hierarchy for

name: get_children
description: Get immediate children of a NAICS code

name: get_siblings
description: Get codes at the same level as a NAICS code

arguments.name: naics_code
arguments.desc: NAICS code to find siblings for

name: classify_business
description: Classify a business description with detailed reasoning

name: get_cross_references
description: Get exclusion/inclusion cross-references for a NAICS code

arguments.name: naics_code
arguments.desc: NAICS code to get cross-references for

name: validate_classification
description: Validate a NAICS classification choice

name: get_sector_overview
description: Get an overview of NAICS sector structure

name: compare_codes
description: Side-by-side comparison of multiple NAICS codes

arguments.name: codes
arguments.desc: List of NAICS codes to compare

name: write_to_workbook
description: Record a classification decision in the workbook

name: search_workbook
description: Search past classification decisions

name: get_workbook_entry
description: Retrieve a specific workbook entry

name: get_workbook_template
description: Get a form template for classification decisions

name: get_workflow_guide
description: Get recommended classification workflows

name: ping
description: Liveness check

name: check_readiness
description: Check if the server is ready to handle requests

name: get_server_health
description: Get detailed component health status

name: get_metrics
description: Get server performance metrics

description: Get shutdown status
